provenance.derivation_method: fixed versioned tag+body parser (deterministic); in-degree = tag+body id-reference scan; staking-decay = updatedAt-age proxy; tele-fit/value from audit:* tags where present else raw-tag fallback

coverage_manifest.method: list_work status:any (88 done/23 ready/3 abandoned/1 claimed/1 in_progress)
list_threads (date-bucket cross-checked: 204+213+83=500, not the 500 cap); 30 round_limit terminal, 0 active near-limit
list_documents prefix=docs/ (no offset param; 1 uncaptured; docs/reviews/ has 2)
NON-ENTITY: Clarification is a Task-status mechanism (input_required) keyed by taskId, no first-class collection
list_audit_entries first page; backbone large (IDs reach audit-4968), true total unknown

neutrality_attestation.g1_deterministic: signals computed by sr-evidence-parser-v1; no LLM judgement in any signal
neutrality_attestation.g5_signal_not_judgement: signals only; NO rank, NO clustering, NO top-candidates
